description: Interactive command that hides one or more shapes on the canvas. Creates a mutator icon button. When t() is specified, shapes are hidden temporarily and auto-restored after the duration. Not auto-playable -- triggered by clicking the mutator icon.
utility: Hide one or more shapes from the canvas with optional auto-restore

arguments.name: shapes
arguments.description: One or more variable references to shapes to hide - e.g., A, B, L

arguments.name: duration
arguments.description: Auto-restore duration. t(0) = permanent hide. Defaults to 5 seconds if t() is specified.

alternates.description: Hide one shape (auto-restores after default duration)
Hide shapes for 3 seconds, then auto-restore

examples.scenario: Hide arcs and points after intersection
